programme.desc: This is a suspenseful revenge drama about a woman whose life was destroyed by the friends she trusted most. After making up her mind to take revenge on those who betrayed her, she returns to reclaim the life that was stolen from her.

programme.title: Gold Mask - EP 53
programme.desc: The drama tells the story of finding the answer to life in a mad fight between three women due to a tragedy caused by false desires and greed.

programme.title: Gold Mask - EP 54
programme.desc: The drama tells the story of finding the answer to life in a mad fight between three women due to a tragedy caused by false desires and greed.

programme.title: Singer 2025 - EP 9
programme.desc: The lineup of Singer 2025 once again features renowned artists from the Greater China region and beyond. The featuring singers include: Mickey Guyton, Beni, Shan Yi Chun, Terry Lin, Zhou Yan, Janice Vidal, Joyce Cheng, Christine Fan, A-Lin etc.

programme.title: Happy Long Stay - EP 9
programme.desc: The three new sets of hosts of "Happy Long Stay" will lead the audience to visit Kaohsiung from different aspects and angle to ensure audiences will have a different perspective and interests in Kaoshiung.

programme.title: The Love Trap - EP 2
programme.desc: KeMing and PeiYa can't believe that they have time travelled to the past, back to the year 1913. Police chief LongGuang asked KeMing to impersonate Master Zhang's third son KeMing to help investigate Boss Liang's murder case, as the two men look exactly alike.

programme.title: The Love Trap - EP 3
programme.desc: MuLan is accused of cheating Boss Yan from the gold jewellery shop. PeiYa decides to help MuLan prove her innocence and modern-day KeMing is forced to help with the investigation.

programme.title: News Tonight
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Why Her? - EP 9
programme.desc: Oh Soo-jae is a talented lawyer who gets caught up in an unexpected case. At law school, she meets the student Gong Chan, who falls in love with her and would do anything to protect her.

programme.title: Singer 2025 - EP 9
programme.desc: The lineup of Singer 2025 once again features renowned artists from the Greater China region and beyond. The featuring singers include: Mickey Guyton, Beni, Shan Yi Chun, Terry Lin, Zhou Yan, Janice Vidal, Joyce Cheng, Christine Fan, A-Lin etc.

programme.title: Happy Long Stay - EP 9
programme.desc: The three new sets of hosts of "Happy Long Stay" will lead the audience to visit Kaohsiung from different aspects and angle to ensure audiences will have a different perspective and interests in Kaoshiung.

programme.title: Good Luck Sam
programme.desc: Sam and Stéphane, childhood friends and ski equipment designers, embark on a wild quest to save their struggling business. They hatch a plan to enter Sam into the Winter Olympics, and have him compete under his father’s home country of Algeria.

programme.title: Rival
programme.desc: 9-year-old Roman follows his mother Oksana, an illegal nurse in Germany. Oksana falls in love with 62-year-old Gert who tries to befriend Roman. While spending an afternoon alone with Roman, Gert suddenly dies of a heart attack, leaving Roman alone.

programme.title: Games People Play
programme.desc: An old group of friends gathers to celebrate Mitzi’s surprise birthday party over a nostalgic weekend at an idyllic seaside villa – just like they used to do as teenagers. Mitzi sets off a game that brings old feelings and power dynamics to the surface.

programme.title: Red Eagle
programme.desc: A Summit between France, England, Portugal and the Pope is to take place in Spain, under the guise of looking for a solution to the conflict between Spain and Portugal; but the ulterior motive is to attack the Kingdom of Spain.

programme.title: Falling Into Place
programme.desc: Kira and Ian meet all too briefly over a winter weekend on the Isle of Skye and form a sudden and deep bond. Back in London, they try to move on with their separate lives - but both have to stop running from themselves before they are ready to meet again.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: Breathless
programme.desc: In an illegal arms case, three men, including two policemen, are dead. Mattheisen reveals a radical right-wing conspiracy, and suspects a mole. However, he is shot dead with Inspector Dorn’s weapon, while Dorn is found at the crime scene with no memory.

programme.title: The Daval Mystery
programme.desc: Jonathann Daval reports the disappearance of his wife Alexia after she fails to return from her morning jog. Over the next three months, the police will launch the most relentless investigation into a media saga that will shake the whole of France.

programme.title: Moon's Walking
programme.desc: On the day of her grandmother’s memorial, 16-year-old Jung-hee escapes a volatile home and goes on a journey in search for the truth behind her grandfather’s disappearance.

programme.title: All The Songs We Never Sang
programme.desc: Rebellious teen Natsumi ventures from Tokyo to a small island to meet her aunt and learn the art of pearl diving (but secretly to find a treasure she was told about as a child).

programme.title: Running On Sand
programme.desc: When an Eritrean refugee about to be deported from Israel is mistaken for the Nigerian striker just signed to a struggling soccer team, his fate depends on the team’s success in this charming, socially relevant dramedy.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: A Little Bit Of Freedom
programme.desc: Haunted by a missing boy's case from 14 years ago, Helen Dorn recently discovers a lead linking to the alleged perpetrator, Ron Faber. Dorn immediately heads for Hamburg when she learns that Faber was apprehended with a deceased Chinese boy in his van.

programme.title: Time For Love
programme.desc: Mikolaj jumps on a train smitten by a beautiful woman. But he is without a ticket. With the aid of charming Edyta, he tries to control the chaos on the train and in his life. Will this journey be enough to find love before Christmas?

programme.title: You Are Not Alone
programme.desc: When Eva returns to her house on the day of her divorce, she finds a bouquet of red roses outside the door. Attached is the note: "You are not alone." The sender is anonymous.

programme.title: Deep In The Wood
programme.desc: During the Krampus festival, little Tommi disappears mysteriously in the woods. He is found 5 years later in a building site on the outskirts of Naples, but his parents and the town locals are suspicious and frightened by his strange behaviour.

programme.title: Falling Into Place
programme.desc: Kira and Ian meet all too briefly over a winter weekend on the Isle of Skye and form a sudden and deep bond. Back in London, they try to move on with their separate lives - but both have to stop running from themselves before they are ready to meet again.

programme.title: Hard Shell, Soft Shell
programme.desc: Loved-up oyster farmer Az thinks he’s made it. But when an elaborate proposal goes awry and his girlfriend Jess breaks his heart, Az is forced to confront his understanding of what happiness really looks like – both hers and his own.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: A Little Bit Of Freedom
programme.desc: Haunted by a missing boy's case from 14 years ago, Helen Dorn recently discovers a lead linking to the alleged perpetrator, Ron Faber. Dorn immediately heads for Hamburg when she learns that Faber was apprehended with a deceased Chinese boy in his van.

programme.title: The Apple of My Eye
programme.desc: Elise is beautiful, funny, and blind. Theo is a seducer but a loser. They love music. But when they meet in the elevator, it's hate at first sight.

programme.title: You Are Not Alone
programme.desc: When Eva returns to her house on the day of her divorce, she finds a bouquet of red roses outside the door. Attached is the note: "You are not alone." The sender is anonymous.

programme.title: In His Hands
programme.desc: Clara, a lawyer, leads a serene but monotonous life alongside her husband Damien and their two children. One evening, she succumbs to the charm of a mysterious sculptor. This one scorching night will have dramatic repercussions for her and her family.

programme.title: Deep In The Wood
programme.desc: During the Krampus festival, little Tommi disappears mysteriously in the woods. He is found 5 years later in a building site on the outskirts of Naples, but his parents and the town locals are suspicious and frightened by his strange behaviour.

programme.title: Passed by Censor
programme.desc: In an Istanbul prison, Zakir is tasked with reading and censoring the letters inmates receive. Tasked with a writing assignment for his night class, Zakir uses a photograph of an inmate's wife for inspiration, but fantasy soon morphs into delusion.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: The Seeds Of Violence
programme.desc: At the Hamburg DOM festival, Helen Dorn and forensic scientist Weyer witness a paramedic's brutal assault. When a high-society boy is later found dead, unravelling a dark secret linking the two cases.

programme.title: Hunters On A White Field
programme.desc: Deep in the Swedish woods, three friends go on an extended weekend hunting trip. After an initial spell of success, the animals suddenly vanish without a trace. Despite being in a forest without animals, the men decide that the hunt must continue.

programme.title: Traces Of Sandalwood
programme.desc: Adopted and living in Spain for years, a young woman returns to Mumbai to discover her roots, accompanied by a handsome Indian guide whom she romances.

programme.desc: Loved-up oyster farmer Az thinks he’s made it. But when an elaborate proposal goes awry and his girlfriend Jess breaks his heart, Az is forced to confront his understanding of what happiness really looks like – both hers and his own.

programme.title: End of Transmission
programme.desc: End of Transmission

programme.title: Ultraman Omega - EP 5
programme.desc: There are many universes, they may be similar, but they have their own characteristics, as in the case of Omegaverse. A universe that's similar to the original Ultra universe, but has its own ultras. Omega is a Space Garrison rookie who was sent to Earth on a mission to protect it from monsters that appear mysteriously.

programme.title: Aroma Puncak Borneo S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: The journey of a nomad to the peaks of the highlands in Borneo. Exploring gastronomy and cuisine while getting to know the customs and cultures of various ethnic groups on the Land of the Hornbills.

programme.title: Bunga Salju - EP 23
programme.desc: Farouk takes over Azizi’s house and moves closer to full control of the company. As Linda and Leo unite to stop him, Maman violently pressures Fatimah to reveal Qaisara’s whereabouts under Tan Sri Iskandar’s threats.

programme.title: Wanita Syurga - EP 10
programme.desc: Farah is determined to make sure Amar falls under her spell and becomes hers. Ardini begins to suspect that the man who was once hers is now slipping away.

programme.title: Danny - EP 2
programme.desc: Danny decided to pursue his interest in Sarah. Liana confides in Nadya, her old friend who is working in Hong Kong. Nadya advices Liana to leave Hosni and follow her to work in Hong Kong. Liana is worried for her autistic child, Aneesa, who requires a lot of care and attention. Sarah is facing problems at work and the company is in need of an investor to survive. Juffrie, turned bankrupt because of Danny, found a way to have his revenge on Danny.

programme.title: Jalan Ampas - EP 4
programme.desc: Jalan Ampas is a drama of two parellel storylines - one a period drama and the other an investigative melodrama set in the present.

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 26
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Masih Ada Yang Peduli - EP 4
programme.desc: Haze from wildfires in Thailand and Indonesia have caused millions to fall ill. Ordinary citizens are learning to firefight and putting everything on the line to quell the raging fires.

programme.title: Remuk - EP 8
programme.desc: The drama never stops for the characters in the story. Every choice is a gamble, every step a turn toward joy or despair. Their lives are a maze of dilemmas and big risks. What will be their fate in the end?

programme.title: Papa Ricky - EP 41
programme.desc: Through careful manipulation, Zara and Puan Ida convince Riqmal and Kathy to let Alisya stay with them while the couple goes on a week-long honeymoon.

programme.title: Ultraman Omega - EP 5
programme.desc: There are many universes, they may be similar, but they have their own characteristics, as in the case of Omegaverse. A universe that's similar to the original Ultra universe, but has its own ultras. Omega is a Space Garrison rookie who was sent to Earth on a mission to protect it from monsters that appear mysteriously.

programme.title: Aroma Puncak Borneo S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: The journey of a nomad to the peaks of the highlands in Borneo. Exploring gastronomy and cuisine while getting to know the customs and cultures of various ethnic groups on the Land of the Hornbills.

programme.title: Bunga Salju - EP 24
programme.desc: Ekin’s attempts to win Azizi’s love backfire, leading him to seek a divorce, which she blames on Qaisara. As Leo’s plan to destroy Farouk and his company unfolds, Qaisara uncovers the truth about her real father.

programme.title: (Live) Berita
